strategy: Hit Myth. He takes +20% Myth and resists 54% Storm and 24% elsewhere, so Myth is your damage school.
Race the clock. From the end of round 12 he casts Insane Bolt every other round, so aim to close the fight before then.
Play around his 3-round Windstorm: every third round he casts it to boost his side's Storm damage. Do not let setup drag through several Windstorms.
Expect him to self-buff with Storm Fuel or a +35% Storm Trap, so shield or heal for a bigger natural attack.
Clear the Malcontent minion, stack Myth blades and Feints on your hitter, and land one big Myth hit inside the first ten rounds.
cheatNotes: He self-buffs with one of two spells.
Every third round he casts Windstorm, boosting his side's Storm damage.
From the end of round 12 and every other round after, he casts Insane Bolt. Close the fight before then.
